name: Crab-Stuffed Bread Cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut bread into 1-inch slices and remove crust.
2. Cut trimmed slices into 1-inch cubes.
3. Hollow out each cube, leaving a shell about 1/8 inch thick.
4. Brush sides and top with melted butter.
5. Place in a single layer on a cookie sheet and bake at 400 degrees for 10 minutes or until light brown and crisp. Cool.
6. In a bowl, blend cheese and egg. Add remaining ingredients and gently mix.
7. Fill bread cubes with the mixture.
8. Bake on a cookie sheet at 400 degrees for 5-10 minutes or until bubbly.
